entity.summary: Solana-based decentralized perpetuals and trading protocol that entered a critical limited state after the April 2026 exploit and officially rebranded to Velocity on July 1, 2026 while the rebuilt successor platform remained in private-beta preparation.
entity.notes: Reclassified from limited to rebranded after the official account announced that Drift was becoming Velocity on 2026-07-01. The private beta was still described as forthcoming and no verified public Velocity platform URL or completed public relaunch was available at review time, so HEI does not yet create a separate successor entity or assign successor_id. The original Drift domain remains reachable and is preserved as the historical URL.

expected.summary: Solana-based decentralized perpetuals and trading protocol that entered a critical limited state in April 2026 after a major exploit and suspension of deposits and withdrawals.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead yet. The April 2026 exploit and deposit / withdrawal suspension are material enough for HEI because they changed platform availability, but no final shutdown marker is confirmed.

changes.summary: Solana-based decentralized perpetuals and trading protocol that entered a critical limited state after the April 2026 exploit and officially rebranded to Velocity on July 1, 2026 while the rebuilt successor platform remained in private-beta preparation.
changes.notes: Reclassified from limited to rebranded after the official account announced that Drift was becoming Velocity on 2026-07-01. The private beta was still described as forthcoming and no verified public Velocity platform URL or completed public relaunch was available at review time, so HEI does not yet create a separate successor entity or assign successor_id. The original Drift domain remains reachable and is preserved as the historical URL.

events.title: Drift rebranded to Velocity
events.description: Drift's official account announced that the Solana perpetuals platform was rebranding to Velocity. The team said a private beta for selected partners and traders would follow in the coming days, without announcing a public relaunch date.
events.notes: HEI uses the official rebrand announcement as the terminal marker for the Drift brand. Velocity remains a prospective successor record until a verified operating platform identity and public URL are available.

evidence.title: Today, Drift is rebranding to Velocity
evidence.notes: First-party announcement states that Drift is rebranding to Velocity and describes the new name as reflecting the rebuilt platform.

evidence.title: Drift Rebrands to Velocity Ahead of Private Beta Launch
evidence.notes: Independent report embeds the official announcement and confirms that the private beta was planned for selected participants, with no public relaunch date stated.
